title: Nonpayment; delinquency; discontinuance of service
doc_html:
§9039.33.  Nonpayment; delinquency; discontinuance of service

The district shall provide by ordinance with respect to nonpayment, delinquency charges and discontinuance of service for water and sewer services provided by the district.

Acts 2001, No. 992, §1.
